creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As lab@gta.com wrote:

> >Description:
> Issuing a "df" while unmounting a floppy that has outstanding I/O will
> cause a reboot.

Is this reproducible for you?

I've just tried on a 3.0-not-so-current machine, and it works there
without a hitch.
